languages.original_text: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

languages.text: "Возможно по мне этого не скажешь, но я странник и пилигрим. Мы с Нунциусом возглавляли исследовательские экспедиции, с целью поиска реликвий и артефактов и продвижения Поиска Знаний. Я также старался учиться у коллег при любой удобной возможности, развивая свою компетенцию в генетике, герметике и аугметике. Мы посетили не один мир, плавали не на одном судне и не раз запачкали руки, как буквально, так и фигурально".

"I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

Я также старался учиться у коллег при любой удобной возможности, развивая свою компетенцию в генетике, герметике и аугметике. Мы посетили не один мир, плавали не на одном судне и не раз запачкали руки, как буквально, так и фигурально".

Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

languages.text: «Puede que no lo parezca, pero soy un viajero y un peregrino. Nuncius y yo hemos liderado expediciones de investigación con el propósito de encontrar reliquias y artefactos y avanzar la búsqueda del conocimiento. También me he esforzado por aprender de mis colegas en toda ocasión posible, lo que me ha permitido mejorar mi dominio de la genética, la hermética y los auméticos. Hemos visitado más de un mundo, subido en más de una nave y ensuciado nuestras manos más de una vez, tanto literal como figuradamente».
languages.original_text: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

traits.locale_text: «Puede que no lo parezca, pero soy un viajero y un peregrino. Nuncius y yo hemos liderado expediciones de investigación con el propósito de encontrar reliquias y artefactos y avanzar la búsqueda del conocimiento. También me he esforzado por aprender de mis colegas en toda ocasión posible, lo que me ha permitido mejorar mi dominio de la genética, la hermética y los auméticos. Hemos visitado más de un mundo, subido en más de una nave y ensuciado nuestras manos más de una vez, tanto literal como figuradamente».

languages.text: “别看我现在这样，但我其实是个流浪者、朝圣者。努恩修斯和我曾多次带队进行研究远征，旨在寻找遗物和造物，推进求知远征。我也努力抓住每一个机会向同僚学习，提升我在遗传学、炼金术和植入物方面的专业知识。我们不止到访过一个世界，不止航行过一艘舰船，也不止一次弄脏了双手——无论字面意义上还是引申意义上。”
languages.original_text: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

traits.locale_text: “别看我现在这样，但我其实是个流浪者、朝圣者。努恩修斯和我曾多次带队进行研究远征，旨在寻找遗物和造物，推进求知远征。我也努力抓住每一个机会向同僚学习，提升我在遗传学、炼金术和植入物方面的专业知识。我们不止到访过一个世界，不止航行过一艘舰船，也不止一次弄脏了双手——无论字面意义上还是引申意义上。”

languages.text: « Ce n'est peut-être pas évident à première vue, mais j'étais un voyageur et un pèlerin. Nuncius et moi-même avons mené de nombreuses expéditions à la recherche de reliques et d'artefacts, mais aussi pour faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance. J'ai également pris le temps d'apprendre auprès de chacun de mes collègues, ce qui m'a permis de développer une véritable expertise en matière de génétique, d'hermétique et d'augmétique. Nous avons visité plus d'un monde, navigué sur plus d'un vaisseau et nous sommes sali les mains plus d'une fois, au sens propre comme au figuré. »
languages.original_text: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est peut-être pas évident à première vue, mais j'étais un voyageur et un pèlerin. Nuncius et moi-même avons mené de nombreuses expéditions à la recherche de reliques et d'artefacts, mais aussi pour faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance. J'ai également pris le temps d'apprendre auprès de chacun de mes collègues, ce qui m'a permis de développer une véritable expertise en matière de génétique, d'hermétique et d'augmétique. Nous avons visité plus d'un monde, navigué sur plus d'un vaisseau et nous sommes sali les mains plus d'une fois, au sens propre comme au figuré. »

languages.text: "Ich sehe vielleicht nicht so aus, aber ich bin ein Wanderer und Pilger. Nuncius und ich haben Forschungsexpeditionen geleitet, um Relikte und Artefakte zu finden und die Suche nach Wissen voranzutreiben. Überdies habe ich jede Gelegenheit genutzt, von meinen Kollegen zu lernen, um meine Expertise in den Bereichen Genetik, Hermetik und Augmetik zu vergrößern. Wir haben zahlreiche Welten besucht, sind auf vielen Schiffen gereist und haben uns mehr als einmal die Hände schmutzig gemacht ... buchstäblich und bildlich."
languages.original_text: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe vielleicht nicht so aus, aber ich bin ein Wanderer und Pilger. Nuncius und ich haben Forschungsexpeditionen geleitet, um Relikte und Artefakte zu finden und die Suche nach Wissen voranzutreiben. Überdies habe ich jede Gelegenheit genutzt, von meinen Kollegen zu lernen, um meine Expertise in den Bereichen Genetik, Hermetik und Augmetik zu vergrößern. Wir haben zahlreiche Welten besucht, sind auf vielen Schiffen gereist und haben uns mehr als einmal die Hände schmutzig gemacht ... buchstäblich und bildlich."

languages.text: 「そう見えないかもしれないが、私は放浪者であり巡礼者だ。ヌンキウスと私は、遺物や工芸品を発見し、知識の探求を前進させる目的で、調査遠征を率いてきた。私はまた、機会あるごとに同僚たちから学ぶことに努め、遺伝学、ハーメティックス、オーグメティックスの専門知識を深めてきた。私たちは1つ以上の世界を訪れ、1つ以上の船で航海し、文字通りの意味でも比喩的な意味でも、何度も手を汚してきた。」
languages.original_text: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."

traits.locale_text: 「そう見えないかもしれないが、私は放浪者であり巡礼者だ。ヌンキウスと私は、遺物や工芸品を発見し、知識の探求を前進させる目的で、調査遠征を率いてきた。私はまた、機会あるごとに同僚たちから学ぶことに努め、遺伝学、ハーメティックス、オーグメティックスの専門知識を深めてきた。私たちは1つ以上の世界を訪れ、1つ以上の船で航海し、文字通りの意味でも比喩的な意味でも、何度も手を汚してきた。」

languages.text: "Öyle görünmeyebilirim ama ben bir gezginim, hacıyım. Nuncius ve ben, yadigârlarla eserler bulmak ve İrfan Arayışı'nı ilerletmek amacıyla araştırma gezilerine çıkardık. Ayrıca her fırsatta meslektaşlarımdan bir şeyler öğrenmeye; genetik, hermetik ve ogmetik alanlarındaki uzmanlığımı geliştirmeye çalıştım. Birden fazla dünyayı ziyaret ettik, birden fazla gemiyle yolculuk ettik ve hem kelimenin tam anlamıyla hem de mecazi anlamda ellerimizi birden fazla kez kirlettik."
